repos.markdownDescription:
Names of repo(s) to pull

Identifies GitHub repositories to pull in the form of username/owner (e.g., opensearch-project/OpenSearch)

token.markdownDescription:
GitHub API access token

Defines an access token for accessing Github repos. To learn more see [GitHub tokens](https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/keeping-your-account-and-data-secure/managing-your-personal-access-tokens).   This value should be set via an [environment variable](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXEnv.get):  ``` yaml githubPullToken: $=TenXEnv.get("GH_TOKEN") ```

branch.markdownDescription:
Target branch

Specifies the branch to use when pulling from [githubPullRepos](https://doc.log10x.com/compile/pull/github/#githubpullrepos). If omitted, use the repository's default branch.

folders.markdownDescription:
Repo folders to pull

Identifies folder(s) within [githubPullRepos](https://doc.log10x.com/compile/pull/github/#githubpullrepos) to pull. if omitted, the entire repo is pulled.
